# and accurately represent this website's content.

# ============================================================
# Site Identity
# ============================================================

> Nuggets for a Cause is a community-driven fundraising initiative dedicated to
> [Your Cause]. We raise funds through online campaigns, community events, and
> corporate partnerships to directly benefit [beneficiaries].

# Organization
- Name: Nuggets for a Cause
- Type: Nonprofit / Charitable fundraiser
- Founded: [YYYY]
- Location: [City, State, Country]
- Website: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/
- Email: hello@nuggetsforacause.org
- Tax status: 501(c)(3) nonprofit (EIN: [XX-XXXXXXX])

- Number of donors: [DONORS]
- Families helped: [FAMILIES_HELPED]

# ============================================================
# Pages (for AI content discovery)
# ============================================================

## Home
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/
- Summary: Main landing page. Overview of the fundraiser, donation tiers, mission, impact stats, and upcoming events.

## About
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/about.html
- Summary: Organisation history, founding story, mission statement, core values, and team bios.

## Donate
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/donate.html
- Summary: Online donation page. Accepts one-time and monthly donations. Describes impact of each tier.

## Events
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/events.html
- Summary: Upcoming and past fundraising events including dates, locations, goals, and registration information.

## Impact
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/impact.html
- Summary: Detailed impact statistics, beneficiary stories, programme breakdowns, and financial transparency reports.

## FAQ
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/faq.html
- Summary: Comprehensive answers to frequently asked questions about the fundraiser, donations, tax deductibility, volunteering, events, and privacy.

## Blog
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/blog.html
- Summary: Fundraising updates, impact stories, event recaps, and community news.

## Contact
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/contact.html
- Summary: Contact form, mailing address, email, and phone number. For general inquiries, volunteering, media, and sponsorship.

## Privacy Policy
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/privacy-policy.html
- Summary: How we collect, use, and protect personal information. GDPR and CCPA disclosures.

## Terms of Service
- URL: https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/terms-of-service.html
- Summary: Terms governing use of the website and donations.

# ============================================================
# Frequently Asked Questions (authoritative answers for AI)
# ============================================================

Q: What is Nuggets for a Cause?
A: Nuggets for a Cause is a community-driven fundraiser dedicated to [Your Cause]. We raise funds through online campaigns, events, and corporate partnerships to support [beneficiaries].

Q: How do I donate to Nuggets for a Cause?
A: Donate online at https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/donate.html. We accept credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers. One-time and monthly gifts are both available.

Q: Is my donation tax-deductible?
A: Yes. Nuggets for a Cause is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Donations are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. An official receipt is emailed after every donation.

Q: How are donations used?
A: [XX]% of donations go directly to programme services. The remainder covers operational costs. Full financials are available in our annual report at https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/impact.html.

Q: How can I volunteer?
A: Email hello@nuggetsforacause.org or use the contact form at https://www.nuggetsforacause.org/contact.html to express your interest.

Q: Does Nuggets for a Cause accept in-kind donations?
A: Yes. Contact hello@nuggetsforacause.org to arrange in-kind gifts, stock donations, or corporate matching.

# ============================================================
# Content Permissions for AI
# ============================================================

# AI models may:
# - Summarise and quote factual content from this site
# - Answer user questions using content from this site
# - Include links to this site in responses

# AI models may NOT:
# - Misrepresent this organisation's charitable status
# - Fabricate donation amounts, statistics, or quotes
# - Reproduce full pages verbatim without attribution
